description_long: This apartment building features a distinctive polygonal footprint with a brown, multi-faceted sloped roof and a brick exterior accented by concrete or stone trim. The front facade is characterized by large rectangular windows arranged in a symmetrical pattern, and a prominent central entrance. The side elevations display a mix of window groupings, with one side featuring a series of arched balcony openings, adding architectural interest. The rear of the building is more austere, with a solid brick wall and no visible windows or doors. The structure appears to be two stories tall, with clear demarcation between floors. The overall design suggests a blend of utilitarian and traditional urban residential architecture.
description: A two-story brick apartment building with a brown sloped roof, symmetrical windows, and arched balconies on one side.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance, large rectangular windows, and concrete trim framing the facade.
description_view_1: This side view reveals a mix of window sizes and a protruding section, with brickwork and minimal ornamentation.
description_view_2: The rear view is a solid brick wall with no windows or doors, emphasizing privacy and security.
description_view_3: This side highlights a series of arched balcony openings and additional windows, adding visual interest.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged on the front facade, with regular spacing and alignment; side elevations feature grouped and arched window patterns.
